workflow.title: From Prescription to Task
workflow.description: Tasks are automatically generated when a Doctor creates a prescription. The system calculates the entire schedule based on the {strong1} and {strong2}.

safety.title: Safety Net & Monitoring
safety.description: The system actively monitors timestamps. If a task passes its due time without action, it flags as .
safety.alert_desc: Alert sent to Head Nurse regarding missed dose for Patient #1024.
safety.audit_desc: Who performed the action, exact timestamp, and any modifications logged permanently.

types.title: Supported Workflow Types
types.type1_desc: Automatically appear in the queue when their time approaches based on the prescription timeline.
types.type2_desc: Immediate administration logic. Allows staff to prescribe and administer "on the spot" without future scheduling.

mapping.title: Precision Mapping
mapping.description: We create a 1-to-1 digital twin of your facility. Every pill has an exact coordinate.

automation.title: Rapid Ingestion
automation.description: Skip manual entry. Scan the manufacturer's barcode, and Curify identifies the product instantly.

logistics.title: Smart Scheduled Transfers
logistics.step1_desc: System scans all for the next 24h.
logistics.step2_desc: Calculates exact dosage needed per Ward.
logistics.result_desc: Automatically creates a transfer order from Central Storage to the Ward Cabinet. No manual counting required.

safety.title: Expiry Alerts
safety.description: Never administer expired drugs. High-priority warnings for items nearing date.

steps.step1_desc: Choose an existing {strong1} or bill a {strong2} entity. Supports VAT/Tax ID entry for corporate clients instantly.
steps.step2_desc: Combine {strong1} (Consultations) and {strong2} (Crutches, Creams) on a single unified receipt.
steps.step3_desc: Add comments, apply discounts, and trigger the . Status updates from {em1} to {em2} instantly.

automation.title: Visit-to-Invoice Automation
automation.description: Don't type details twice. Click "Issue Receipt" on a patient visit to pull context instantly.

templates.title: Payment Templates
templates.description: Save bundles like "Annual Checkup" to auto-fill services, prices, and tax rates in one click.

onboarding.title: Secure Onboarding
onboarding.description: Admins trigger an invite via email. This links the user's unique identity to your facility instantly.

routing.title: Smart Routing
routing.description: Specialties aren't just tags. They dictate workflow. A automatically sees Cardiac patients.

access.title: Granular Permissions
access.description: Default roles get you started, but give you control. Restrict sensitive financial data or enable prescribing rights per user.

directory.title: Organization Directory
directory.description: Smart grouping by Role for instant visibility.

hero.title:
If it happens in Curify,

we track it.
hero.description: Curify offers powerful initial analytics out of the box. Every task, transaction, and admission is logged to give you instant visibility into your facility's pulse without any setup.

operational.title: Standard Operational Intelligence
operational.description: Identify {strong1}efficiency blocks{/strong1} and {strong2}revenue leaks{/strong2} immediately. Our standard suite covers the core pillars of your organization: Inventory, Staff, and Finance.
operational.pl_desc: Real-time calculation of COGS (Cost of Goods Sold) per treatment vs Revenue.

custom.title: Custom Metrics Engine
custom.description: Every organization has unique pain points. Curify allows you to build custom workflows and analysis to find specific blocks.
custom.research_label: Research specific patient cohorts (e.g., "Post-Op complications in Q3").
custom.track_label: Track niche KPIs like "Stent Success Rate" or "Birth Types".

hero.title:
The central nervous system

of patient care.
hero.description: One unified card for everything. From demographics and AMKA auto-fill to real-time vitals and admission history.

automation.amka_desc: Entering the 11-digit ID automatically fetches official data from the National Health System. Zero typing errors.
automation.anomaly_desc: Inputs aren't just numbers. If a vital sign (HR, SpO2) deviates from safety norms, the system triggers an instant alert.

templates.title: No-Code Clinical Templates
templates.description: A Dermatologist needs skin mapping. A Cardiologist needs EKG notes. Create custom forms without writing code.

protocols.title: 1-Click Protocols
protocols.description: Don't prescribe items one by one. Apply a "Post-Surgery Bundle" to instantly add 3 meds, 2 nursing tasks, and diet orders to the schedule.
protocols.documents_desc: Store X-rays and consents in nested folders, just like on your desktop.

hero.title:
Not just a calendar.

An operational guardrail.
hero.description: Curify's calendar is context-aware. It links patients to records, prevents double-booking via Google Sync, and enforces Smart Tag Limits to prevent staff burnout.

reception.title: Reception Command
reception.description: Managing high traffic? The Aggregate View allows receptionists to overlay multiple doctors' schedules to find open slots instantly.

sync.google_desc: Personal commitments block medical slots automatically. No more double-booking.
sync.reminders_desc: Reduce no-shows. We send SMS/Email alerts to patients 24h before their visit automatically.
sync.reminder_msg: Reminder sent to George K. for appointment tomorrow at 10:00 AM.

linking.title: Deep Patient Linking
linking.description: Appointments aren't just time slots. They are linked directly to the Medical File. Click the event to see history, meds, and notes instantly.

hero.title:
Turn raw data into

medical insights.
hero.description: Stop digging through paper files. Use our Advanced Query Builder to filter millions of records in seconds. Perfect for audits, studies, and cohort analysis.

snapshot.title: Operational Snapshot
snapshot.description: Instant visibility into load and capacity the moment you log in.

search.title: Universal Search
search.description: Don't scroll through lists. Find any patient by Name, AMKA (SSN), or Internal ID instantly.

hero.title:
The heartbeat of

patient flow.
hero.description: A macro-level view of every hospitalization. Track occupancy, throughput efficiency, and discharge rates in real-time.

register.title: The Master Register
register.description: Forget scattered Excel sheets. Every admission event is logged with a status tag. Jump instantly from the log to the specific Admission Details or the Patient Master Profile.

referrals.title: Referrals & Service Tickets
referrals.description: Not every interaction is a full admission. Referrals track specific services like Blood Tests or X-Rays as individual tickets, keeping the main timeline clean.

filtering.title: Deep Filtering
filtering.role_desc: Receptionists see the admission exists (for billing). Clinical details remain locked without medical clearance.

hero.title:
Paperless workflow.

Print-ready backups.
hero.description: Curify is digital-first, but reality-aware. Generate professional, legible PDF reports for Vitals, Meds, and Discharge Summaries instantly.

prescriptions.title: High-Fidelity Prescriptions
prescriptions.description: It's not just "Drug + Dose". Capture the nuance of hospital workflows with specific flags and responsibility tracking.
prescriptions.precise_desc: Define exact Start/End times for infusions.
prescriptions.resp_desc: Assign specific supervisors to high-risk lines.

privacy.title: Granular Privacy
privacy.description: Not everyone needs to see everything. Lock down sensitive files (VIPs, Psychiatric) using Access Control Lists (ACLs).

hero.title:
The Flight Recorder

for your organization.
hero.description: Every click, every edit, every deletion. Curify captures a granular Audit Trail to ensure absolute transparency and trace root causes instantly.

live.created_prescription: Created new prescription #RX-992 for Patient A.

diff.title: Not just "Who", but "What".
diff.description: We don't just log that a record changed. We snapshotted the state before and the state after. This is critical for medical error resolution.

security.title: Deterrent Security
security.description: Knowing every footprint is recorded prevents malicious data theft and unauthorized browsing.

error.title: Error Resolution
error.description: Spot a mistake? Trace it back to the exact timestamp and user for immediate correction/retraining.

hero.title:
Your facility's

digital twin.
hero.description: A complete hierarchical map of your organization. From the building level down to the individual bed, Curify tracks capacity and resources in real-time.

config.title: Clinic Configuration
config.description: Define operational units like "West Wing" or "Radiology". These containers manage the staff access and patient flow.

interop.title: Gov. Integration ID
interop.description: Seamlessly map internal clinics to National Health System regulatory codes for automated reporting.

rooms.title: Room Management
rooms.description: The functional units of care. Track capacity, assign equipment, and categorize by medical need.
rooms.list_desc: Top-down search across the entire organization.

hero.title:
Your organization's

central archive.
hero.description: A desktop-class file manager built for the web. Organize thousands of scans, consent forms, and reports in a structured, nested hierarchy.

search.title: Find a needle in a haystack.
search.description: The search engine scans across all patients and folders simultaneously. Use granular filters to trace documents by Uploader (Accountability) or Date Range (Specific Window).

security.title: Global Search, Scoped Access.
security.description: The Global File Finder does not bypass patient profile security. If a user is restricted from viewing a VIP patient, those files will remain invisible in the global search results. Zero leaks.

hero.title:
Clinical standards,

automated.
hero.description: Don't rely on memory. Define Protocols (bundles) and Custom Templates to ensure every patient receives the exact standard of care, every time.

builder.title: No-Code Form Builder
builder.description: Cardiology needs EKG notes. Dermatology needs skin maps. Curify allows admins to design Custom Medical Records with a drag-and-drop interface.

behaviors.links_desc: Generate a URL for patient intake forms. Submissions directly populate the EMR profile.
behaviors.singleton_desc: "Update only" templates. Perfect for a "Patient Summary" card that evolves over time.
behaviors.nested_desc: Build "sub-components" (e.g., Address Block) and reuse them inside multiple larger forms.

computation.title: The AI Field
computation.description: Don't ask users to do math. A special field type that runs logic based on other data points instantly.
